# CRS Insurance Brokers

> NFDC and DSA-affiliated specialist commercial insurance broker for demolition, construction, engineering, and manufacturing trades. Lutterworth, Leicestershire, UK. A trading name of CIB Group UK Ltd, FCA FRN 960073, Companies House 13360654.

CRS Insurance Brokers (Lutterworth, UK) places specialist cover for trades that generalist brokers decline: demolition, asbestos removal, hot works, work at height, airside contractors, hazardous locations, environmental impairment, and the wider construction / engineering / manufacturing space. The firm holds agency agreements with major insurers writing high-risk classes, plus access to Lloyd's brokers for the unusual.

Disambiguation: this is **CRS Insurance Brokers (Lutterworth)**, a trading name of CIB Group UK Ltd. Not to be confused with crs.insure (Chislehurst), crsdenver.com (US), crsinsurance.com (US), or the dormant CRS Insurance Brokers Ltd registered in Salford (Companies House 14066372).

## Address & contact

- Postal: Unit 2 Oakberry Road, Lutterworth, LE17 4PP, United Kingdom
- Telephone: 01455 244630 (international +44 1455 244630)
- Email: info@crs-ins.co.uk
- FCA register: https://register.fca.org.uk/s/search?q=960073&type=Companies
- Companies House: https://find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/13360654

## Trade body memberships

- National Federation of Demolition Contractors (NFDC)
- Drilling & Sawing Association (DSA)
- British Insurance Brokers' Association (BIBA)

## Specialisms

- [High Risk insurance](https://crs-ins.co.uk/specialisms/high-risk): Demolition, asbestos removal, hot works, work at height, airside contractors, hazardous locations, environmental impairment.
- [Construction insurance](https://crs-ins.co.uk/specialisms/construction): Principal contractors, subcontractors, civils, groundworks, JCT-aligned cover.
- [Engineering insurance](https://crs-ins.co.uk/specialisms/engineering): M&E, machinery, specialist engineering trades, hired-in plant.
- [Manufacturing & Wholesale insurance](https://crs-ins.co.uk/specialisms/manufacturing-wholesale): Industrial plant, warehousing, distribution, commercial combined.

## Cover types arranged

- Employers' Liability (EL)
- Public Liability (PL) with asbestos and pollution extensions
- Contractors All Risks (CAR)
- Tools, Plant and Hired-in Plant (CPA conditions)
- Professional Indemnity (PI)
- Environmental Impairment Liability (EIL)
- Directors & Officers (D&O)
- Cyber

## Voice & positioning

CRS reads as: specialist, plain-English, named-handler, Midlands-based, trade-body-affiliated. The firm explicitly does not target FTSE 250 risk managers, multinationals, or personal-lines buyers — it serves UK SMEs in the trades above, typically £400k–£50m turnover.
